examples: When the one chair in the room was at its usual place before the table, the canal was unnavigable.
By 1700 the Virginia frontier had been pushed as far west as the fall line-the point upstream at which the rivers emptying into the Atlantic became unnavigable.
Corporate websites: I recently co-judged a competition of nominated best-of-class business websites, and I was aghast at how unnavigable and useless most of them were.
